tree.name: Adem Bona
tree.note: Drafted #41 overall by Philadelphia from UCLA. Selected with the 2024 2nd round pick acquired from Boston in the Jaden Springer trade (Feb 8, 2024).

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaden Springer
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: PHI traded Jaden Springer to Boston for a 2024 2nd round draft pick (Adem Bona was later selected #41). Philadelphia also received a trade exception.
